publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-03-06 23:01:12 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Library. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

odd.head: General Note
odd.p: Use the subject index, to look up a category number which corresponds to the microfiche. Then use the microfiche to view individual photos and retrieve their unique numbers. The number can then be used to locate the actual print photograph using the location guide. Approximately 500 photos were not microfilmed and will not appear in the microfiche.

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Access requires assistance from the photo archivist. To make requests to this collection contact the Rare and Manuscript Collections reference desk.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Photographs, pictorial works and other graphic materials relating to relating to all aspects of Cornell University. The material can be browsed on microform.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Archives picture collection, #13-6-2497. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

altformavail.head: Alternate Form Available
altformavail.p: Use microfiche sleeves for access. Microfilm masters are not for use.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes seven 8x20 negatives and prints: tennis in the Old Armory (2 negatives, 2 prints); Gil Dobie with football team, freshman with "F" (1 negative); band performing in Schoellkopf (2 negatives); audience watching football Old Armory? (1 negative); Gil Dobie and football team, 1929 (1 negative).

odd.head: General
odd.p: Also known as the Archives Photo Collection or APC.

unittitle.extref: Link to the guide containing categories of the types of photographs that are available.
